title: Oracle Solaris Zone Resource
description: Represents a configurable resource within an Oracle Solaris Zone, such as a network interface, device, filesystem, resource control, or CPU/memory allocation. Resources are managed through the zonecfg interface exposed via the RAD zonemgr module.

type.description: Resource type identifier determining the kind of resource

properties.description: Array of property name-value pairs for the resource

parent.description: Reference to a parent resource, if applicable

name.description: Property name (e.g., physical, address, dir, special, ncpus, physical, locked)

listvalue.description: Array of values for list-type properties

complexvalue.description: Array of values for complex-type properties (key=value pairs)
